overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character in a fedora and leather jacket initially standing at a street food stall counter, then moving through the stall interior and exiting onto a gritty urban street. The character walks toward a building with a prominent 'CALI EXPRESS' neon sign, with atmospheric haze and warm sunlight filtering through the dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food stall with metal counter

events.description: customer in hat takes a drag from cigarette and exhales smoke

agents.ego_description: standing at the food stall counter, facing the bartender while smoking

notable_agents.action: bartender wiping down the counter and preparing items behind the glass barrier

entered.detail: long metal serving counter with bottles and glasses on top
large circular neon sign with letter C and CALI EXPRESS text visible through the stall opening
protective glass shield on the counter separating staff from customers
vertical cyan neon sign on the left wall of the stall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a gritty street food stall with a metal counter and glass barrier. The player character stands at the counter smoking while a bartender works behind the counter. Through the open front, the neon 'CALI EXPRESS' sign is visible in the distance, establishing the cyberpunk urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow food stall interior with storage shelves

events.description: character moves away from the counter and walks toward the left side of the stall
begins moving past the counter toward the stall exit

agents.ego_description: moving around the interior of the food stall, walking past the counter and toward the exit

notable_agents.action: bartender continues working behind the counter, occasionally looking up

entered.detail: metal shelving units with boxes and supplies stacked on them
large wooden cabinet or oven unit near the stall entrance
red plastic bucket on the floor near the counter

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the counter and explores the stall interior, passing shelves and equipment. The camera circles around to show the bartender from different angles as the character approaches the stall exit, with the Cali Express sign shifting to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban pedestrian street with commercial storefronts

events.description: exits the food stall into the open street, transitioning from sheltered to exposed environment
begins walking directly toward the Cali Express entrance gates

agents.ego_description: walking down the urban street toward the Cali Express building entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing standing near the Cali Express entrance

entered.detail: green metal security gates at the Cali Express entrance with vertical bars
large advertisement posters on the building wall including one for CIRKUS
concrete sidewalk with stains and wear marks

segments.scene_description: The character exits the stall into a sunlit urban street with atmospheric haze, walking toward the Cali Express building. The large circular neon sign dominates the view as the character approaches the entrance gates, passing posters on the wall and other pedestrians in the gritty cyberpunk environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, enclosed interior of a street food stall out into a hazy, sun-drenched cyberpunk thoroughfare. It begins with the character smoking at a metal counter behind a glass barrier, while the distant glow of a Cali Express neon sign flickers through the open storefront. As the character moves away from the counter, the camera circles through the stall's interior, passing equipment and shelves before shifting the neon sign toward the edge of the frame. The scene then opens up as the character exits the stall, transitioning from the gritty indoor shadows into a bright urban street filled with atmospheric haze. Finally, the camera follows the character toward the entrance gates of the Cali Express building, passing pedestrians and wall posters as the massive circular neon sign comes to dominate the view.
